title: SR Vaults
body:
# SRVaults Plugin
**Because Ender Chests Aren’t Enough 🗝️📦** ## 🌟 Features - **Personal Storage Vaults** – Every player gets private vaults - **Permission-Based System** – Flexible vault access controls - **Upgradeable Vaults** – Expandable vault slots with economy integration - **Customizable GUI** – Beautiful menus with MiniMessage support - **Multi-Vault System** – Players can own multiple vaults - **Performance Optimized** – Async database, caching, preloading - **PlaceholderAPI Support** – Integrates with other plugins - **Geyser Compatibility** – Bedrock & Java friendly - **Crash-Safe** – Dupe protection and reliable data saving --- ## 📋 Requirement - **Java**: 21 or higher - **Server Software**: Paper/Purpur 1.16.5+ (1.21.8 recommended) - **Dependencies** (optional): Vault, PlaceholderAPI, LuckPerms, Geyser --- ## 🎮 Commands | Command | Permission | Description | |---------|------------|-------------| | `/vault` | `srvaults.player` | Open your personal vaults | | `/vault ` | `srvaults.player` | Open a specific vault | | `/vault reload` | `srvaults.admin` | Reload plugin configuration | | `/vault add ` | `srvaults.admin` | Add vaults to a player | | `/v` | `srvaults.player` | Alias for `/vault` | | `/pv` | `srvaults.player` | Alias for `/vault` | --- ## ⚙️ Configuration
config.yml ```yaml # SRVaults Configuration File debug: false autosave-interval: 60 vault-open-delay: 1000 settings: default-vaults: 1 default-vault-slots: 9 max-vault-slots: 54 max-vaults: 0 upgrades: levels: - 9 - 18 - 27 - 36 - 45 - 54 cost-per-level: 15
